title: Young Boy Sitting Stool Wearing Beige Hoodie
sourceTitle: Young Boy Sitting Stool Wearing Beige Hoodie

imagePrompts.prompt: A young boy sitting on a stool, wearing a beige hoodie and black pants, calm confident expression, surrounded by multiple cute mini cartoon versions of himself in different poses (sitting, climbing rope, taking photos, waving using phone), warm yellow-orange gradient background, modern motivational poster style, soft cinematic lighting, highly detailed face, 3D cartoon characters, depth of field, aesthetic composition, books stacked beside him (self-improvement theme), notebook on floor
imagePrompts.title: Young Boy Sitting Stool Wearing Beige Hoodie

prompt: A young boy sitting on a stool, wearing a beige hoodie and black pants, calm confident expression, surrounded by multiple cute mini cartoon versions of himself in different poses (sitting, climbing rope, taking photos, waving using phone), warm yellow-orange gradient background, modern motivational poster style, soft cinematic lighting, highly detailed face, 3D cartoon characters, depth of field, aesthetic composition, books stacked beside him (self-improvement theme), notebook on floor
originalPrompt: A young boy sitting on a stool, wearing a beige hoodie and black pants, calm confident expression, surrounded by multiple cute mini cartoon versions of himself in different poses (sitting, climbing rope, taking photos, waving using phone), warm yellow-orange gradient background, modern motivational poster style, soft cinematic lighting, highly detailed face, 3D cartoon characters, depth of field, aesthetic composition, books stacked beside him (self-improvement theme), notebook on floor

promptTranslations.zh: 一个小男孩坐在凳子上，穿着米色连帽衫和黑色裤子，表情平静自信，周围有多个可爱的迷你卡通版本的自己，不同的姿势（坐着、爬绳子、拍照、挥舞手机），温暖的黄橙色渐变背景，现代励志海报风格，柔和的电影灯光，细节丰富的脸，3D卡通人物，景深，美学构图，堆在他身边的书籍（自我提升主题），地板上的笔记本
promptTranslations.fr: Un jeune garçon assis sur un tabouret, vêtu d'un sweat à capuche beige et d'un pantalon noir, expression calme et confiante, entouré de plusieurs mini-dessins animés mignons de lui-même dans différentes poses (assis, grimper à la corde, prendre des photos, agiter au téléphone), fond dégradé jaune-orange chaud, style d'affiche de motivation moderne, éclairage cinématographique doux, visage très détaillé, personnages de dessins animés 3D, profondeur de champ, composition esthétique, livres empilés à côté de lui (thème d'auto-amélioration), cahier au sol
promptTranslations.ru: Мальчик сидит на табурете, в бежевой толстовке и черных брюках, спокойное уверенное выражение лица, окруженный множеством милых мини-мультяшных версий самого себя в разных позах (сидит, карабкается по веревке, фотографирует, машет телефоном), теплый желто-оранжевый градиентный фон, современный стиль мотивационного плаката, мягкое кинематографическое освещение, высокодетализированное лицо, 3D-персонажи мультфильмов, глубина резкости, эстетическая композиция, книги, сложенные рядом с ним (тема самосовершенствования), блокнот на полу
promptTranslations.pt: Um menino sentado em um banquinho, vestindo um moletom bege e calça preta, expressão calma e confiante, cercado por várias versões fofas de si mesmo em diferentes poses (sentado, escalando corda, tirando fotos, acenando usando o telefone), fundo gradiente amarelo-laranja quente, estilo de pôster motivacional moderno, iluminação cinematográfica suave, rosto altamente detalhado, personagens de desenhos animados em 3D, profundidade de campo, composição estética, livros empilhados ao lado dele (tema de autoaperfeiçoamento), caderno no chão
promptTranslations.ja: ベージュのパーカーと黒のズボンを着て椅子に座っている少年、落ち着いた自信に満ちた表情、さまざまなポーズ（座っている、ロープを登る、写真を撮る、電話を使って手を振る）をした自分の複数のかわいいミニ漫画バージョンに囲まれている、暖かい黄色とオレンジ色のグラデーションの背景、現代的な動機付けのポスタースタイル、柔らかい映画のような照明、非常に詳細な顔、3D漫画のキャラクター、被写界深度、美的構成、横に積まれた本（自己改善のテーマ）、床に置かれたノート
promptTranslations.ko: 베이지색 후드티와 검은색 바지를 입고 의자에 앉아 있는 어린 소년, 차분하고 자신감 넘치는 표정, 다양한 포즈(앉기, 밧줄 오르기, 사진 찍기, 전화 손 흔들기)의 여러 귀여운 미니 만화 버전, 따뜻한 노란색-주황색 그라데이션 배경, 현대적인 동기 부여 포스터 스타일, 부드러운 영화 조명, 매우 세밀한 얼굴, 3D 만화 캐릭터, 피사계 심도, 미적 구성, 옆에 쌓인 책(자기 개선 테마), 바닥에 노트북
